description: This compelling email template is designed to rally support and promote activism against hate and racism, specifically targeting injustices faced by the Asian community. It's a powerful tactic for non-profit organizations striving to create a world free of hate and discrimination. The design incorporates elements of glitch aesthetics, symbolizing the disruption of social norms and challenging hate narratives. It provides a platform to share stories from the street, personal experiences that highlight the need for justice and equality. This template is a call to action, encouraging recipients to join the fight against racism, promoting the message of 'no hate' and 'stop the hate'. It's not just an email, but a beacon of hope for equality and justice.
short_description: Promote anti-racism campaigns and share stories from the Asian community with this vibrant email template. Ideal for activism and non-profit initiatives, the modern glitch aesthetic adds impact to your message. Stand against hate, fight for justice and inspire equality with this powerful call to action.

designer.description: I design, create layouts, videos and animations. I have been working in the world of communication since 2012. I believe that feeding on cinema, music, and art is an essential source of enrichment to always give new forms to creativity.
